summary: Iteration 336 - Testing Konekt B2B platform batch 1 fixes. Backend tests: 11/13 passed (2 errors due to rate limiting, not actual failures). Frontend: Marketplace page verified working with service cards and correct 'No Listing Found' behavior. Admin pages could not be fully tested via Playwright due to aggressive rate limiting on login endpoint.

minor.issue: Aggressive rate limiting (429) after ~5 login attempts, blocks testing

seed_data_creation: None - data was cleared by go-live reset in previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All batch 1 fixes verified via code review and backend tests. Rate limiting on login endpoint is aggressive - wait 2+ minutes between login attempts. Key verifications: 1) profit_month floors at 0 when revenue_month <= 0 (lines 122-123 in admin_facade_routes.py), 2) Marketplace 'No Listing Found' only shows when filters active (line 167 in MarketplaceBrowsePageContent.jsx), 3) Operations nav has all 5 items (lines 87-91 in adminNavigation.js), 4) Settings Hub Launch Controls has Testing Mode and Go-Live Reset (lines 820-920 in AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx), 5) Quote creation uses CanonicalDocumentRenderer with correct props (lines 228-254 in CreateQuotePage.jsx).

dashboard_profit_kpi.verification: Backend test confirmed profit_month returns 0 when no revenue. Code review confirmed floor logic at lines 122-123 in admin_facade_routes.py

marketplace_no_listing_behavior.verification: Playwright test confirmed 'No Listing Found' not shown when no filter active. Code review confirmed logic at line 167 in MarketplaceBrowsePageContent.jsx
marketplace_no_listing_behavior.ui_verified: Marketplace page loads with 37 products, service cards visible, filter controls working

operations_navigation.verification: Code review confirmed all 5 items in Operations section: Orders & Fulfillment, Site Visits, Deliveries, Purchase Orders, Supply Review (lines 87-91 in adminNavigation.js)

settings_hub_launch_controls.verification: Backend test confirmed launch_controls in settings-hub response with system_mode field. Code review confirmed Testing Mode option and Go-Live Reset section (lines 820-920 in AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx)

go_live_reset_endpoint.verification: Code review confirmed endpoint at POST /api/admin/system/go-live-reset (lines 211-266 in admin_facade_routes.py). Returns deleted_counts for all cleared collections.

quote_creation_preview.verification: Code review confirmed CreateQuotePage.jsx uses CanonicalDocumentRenderer with correct props: docType='quote', toBlock, lineItems, subtotal, tax, total, currency, notes, paymentTermLabel (lines 228-254)

code_review_findings.profit_floor_logic: Lines 122-123 in admin_facade_routes.py: 'if revenue_month <= 0: profit_month = 0' - correctly floors profit at 0 when no revenue
code_review_findings.marketplace_empty_state: Line 167 in MarketplaceBrowsePageContent.jsx: '!filters.group_id && !filters.category_id && !filters.q ? null' - correctly hides 'No Listing Found' when no filter active
code_review_findings.operations_nav_items: Lines 87-91 in adminNavigation.js: All 5 items present - Orders & Fulfillment, Site Visits, Deliveries, Purchase Orders, Supply Review
code_review_findings.launch_controls_ui: Lines 820-920 in AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: LaunchTab component has Testing Mode select option and Go-Live Reset section with confirmation flow
code_review_findings.quote_preview_renderer: Lines 228-254 in CreateQuotePage.jsx: CanonicalDocumentRenderer used with docType='quote', toBlock, lineItems props for branded preview
